ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the game took place */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game in which the stats were recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., HBFR, WR) */,
  "kicks" INTEGER /* Number of kicks made by the player */,
  "handballs" INTEGER /* Number of handballs made by the player */,
  "disposals" INTEGER /* Total disposals (kicks + handballs) */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Number of marks taken by the player */,
  "hitouts" INTEGER /* Number of hitouts by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "behinds" INTEGER /* Number of behinds scored by the player */,
  "frees_for" INTEGER /* Number of free kicks awarded to the player */,
  "frees_against" INTEGER /* Number of free kicks conceded by the player */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Number of clearances made by the player */,
  "clangers" INTEGER /* Number of clangers (mistakes) made by the player */,
  "bounces" INTEGER /* Number of bounces made by the player */,
  "goal_assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists leading to goals */,
  "time_on_ground" TEXT /* Total time the player spent on the ground during the game */,
  "fantasy_points" INTEGER /* Fantasy points scored by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Colors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Player's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Player's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Player's height in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" INTEGER /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's primary position */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* The team the player is currently with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
column_names: Year in which the game took place
